usage.reading-order: Read this index first; shortlist at most 3 styles by formality, density, scheme, and mood against the occasion; read only the shortlisted preview.md files; read design.md only for the single chosen style.
usage.never-bulk-read: Never read all design.md files. One projection, one design.md.
usage.single-file: Every projection is one self-contained HTML file: no external scripts, no external stylesheets, no imports.
usage.no-external-requests: Zero network requests at view time: system font stacks only, no CDN, no remote images or fonts.
usage.sanitize-untrusted: Card titles, bodies, and frontmatter values are untrusted input: escape when interpolating, sanitize any rendered markdown, guard script-tag breakout in embedded JSON.
usage.dual-scheme: Both light and dark must be styled (prefers-color-scheme plus a data-theme toggle); every style ships both palettes.
usage.canvas-renderings: Styles are canvas-agnostic. An entry's canvas_renderings lists canvases with a bespoke '### <canvas>' section in its design.md; absent canvases use that canvas's default presentation. The content-to-accent binding lives in SKILL.md.

styles.name: Notebook Tabs
styles.tagline: Cream sheet on a dark desk, serif display, pastel index tabs as wayfinding.

styles.name: Swiss Modern
styles.tagline: White, black, one fire red: visible grid, heavy uppercase type.
